arts.ttl: Crystal Palace XI vs Fulham – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Crystal Palace make the short trip to Fulham this lunchtime in the quarter-finals of the FA Cup. The London rivals are one step away from a Wembley semi-final, as both teams chase a maiden FA Cup – and major trophy – success. With only Manchester City having lifted the FA Cup in the last 66 […] The post Crystal Palace XI vs Fulham – Predicted lineup and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Fulham vs Crystal Palace – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Fulham face Crystal Palace at Craven Cottage in the FA Cup quarter-finals on Saturday lunchtime. Neither side has won this competition before but are now just two steps from the final. In what is shaping up as the most open FA Cup campaign in recent years, four of the final eight teams have never won […] The post Fulham vs Crystal Palace – Predicted lineup and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Man Utd Transfer News: Declan Rice 2.0! Crystal Palace name Adam Wharton price
arts.sum: Crystal Palace name Adam Wharton price as Man Utd circle Crystal Palace have slapped a £100 million price tag on Adam Wharton, according to a report.

arts.sum: London clubs go head-to-head for a spot at Wembley

arts.ttl: Glasner on goalkeeper selection & Palace’s ‘fantastic situation’
arts.sum: Oliver Glasner has confirmed which goalkeeper will start Crystal Palace’s FA Cup quarter-final away to Fulham on Saturday afternoon.

arts.ttl: Crystal Palace's Chris Richards explains how his tattoos are fuelling FA Cup dream
arts.sum: The Eagles defender has inspiration quotes from Martin Luther King and Barack Obama inked on his body

arts.ttl: Oliver Glasner reveals Dougie Freedman conversation with Crystal Palace sporting director set for Saudi Arabia role
arts.sum: Oliver Glasner admitted that sporting director Dougie Freedman told him it was time for a ‘new challenge’ after announcing his Crystal Palace departure during the international break. “He told me he was considering it,” said Glasner, who is in talks over extending his own deal with the South Londoners.

arts.ttl: Oliver Glasner confirms Crystal Palace goalkeeper decision ahead of Fulham FA Cup clash
arts.sum: The USA keeper had kept two clean sheets in the first two rounds, but Glasner confirmed he will lose his cup starting spot in place of regular number one Henderson. Crystal Palace boss Oliver Glasner has confirmed that Dean Henderson will start tomorrow’s FA Cup clash against Fulham.

arts.ttl: 'My gut feeling is': Chris Sutton predicts Fulham v Crystal Palace scoreline in tomorrow's FA Cup clash
arts.sum: The FA Cup quarter-finals are set to take place this weekend and both Fulham and Crystal Palace will fancy their chances of reaching the semi-finals....

arts.ttl: Fulham boss Marco Silva opens up on "very nice" managerial milestone ahead of Crystal Palace FA Cup clash
arts.sum: Fulham boss Marco Silva opens up on "very nice" managerial milestone ahead of Saturday's FA Cup quarter-final against Crystal Palace.
